Every count carries its verbatim expression; quotes are transcribed, not paraphrased.

> **Purpose.** Claim-by-claim review of every 2026-07-15 corpus-rework successor against code, feeding the HALT-1 operator gate: (1) the SEED-1 К-L count decision (= F-9 disposition); (2) KERNEL Annex A approval; (3) MIGRATION_PLAN scalar acknowledgement; (4) ratification of the fix list (FIX-NOW / DEFER-to-F-ledger / REJECT per finding). No Phase B edit outside the ratified list.

| Document | Anchors (checked / EXACT / DRIFTED / WRONG) | Truth-law | Findings | Verdict |

**SEED-1 — RESOLVED ANALYTICALLY (decision remains the operator's at HALT-1).** `KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md:37` verbatim: "Series state: **21 invariants** — К-L1..К-L19 (К-L6 SUPERSEDED counted) + sub-invariants К-L3.1/К-L7.1/К-L15.1; К-L20 reserved separately." The Part 0 summary table (lines 408-430) carries 23 rows; excluding К-L20 (RESERVED) → **22 counted rows** (19 base incl. К-L6 + 3 subs); the `### К-L` heading census gives the same 22. The ratified counting convention is `K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md:198`: "21 invariants (К-L1..L19 + 3 subs **− 1 SUPERSEDED counted**; К-L20 reserved separately)" — 21 holds only with К-L6 **excluded**; the rework **inverted** the exclusion clause into "(К-L6 SUPERSEDED counted)". Corroborating standing law: `RESERVED_SURFACE_MUTABILITY.md:86` pins the «21 final» composition in the immutable catalog as "К-L1..5 + К-L7..11 + subs К-L3.1/7.1/15.1 + К-L12..19, **К-L6 SUPERSEDED excluded**, К-L20 reserved excluded" (18+3=21 ✓). Occurrences of the count inside the five R1 docs: exactly ONE (the headline itself). Corpus-wide census: 93 Latin "21 (invariant|final)" hits + 0 Cyrillic — all consistent with the К-L6-excluded convention; nearly all live in EXECUTED briefs / closure evidence / REGISTER narrative fields that are immutable historical records. **Variant (b) (recompose keeping 21) therefore touches ONE line; variant (a) (rewrite to 22) would contradict the RESERVED_SURFACE_MUTABILITY immutable-catalog pin and strand ~90 immutable historical citations.** Proposed variant-(b) text (R1-2): `Series state: **21 invariants** — К-L1..К-L19 (К-L6 SUPERSEDED listed for traceability, excluded from the count) + sub-invariants К-L3.1/К-L7.1/К-L15.1; К-L20 reserved separately.` Note: PR #43's own body states "Part 0 … (22 инварианта, машинно сверены с K_CLOSURE §2)" — the PR body counted table rows; the doc headline states the ratified active count. The two are reconcilable only under variant (b) wording that names both numbers or the exclusion.

**Annex A (checklist item [2]) — VERIFIED PRESENT AND SOURCE-EXACT.** Rows A-1..A-4 at lines 552-555: A-1 Rule 5 trampoline reconciliation (was-quotes verbatim vs `historical/KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md:319/:897`); A-2 К-L12 row — canonical blockquote word-for-word identical to `K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md:497-501` + Current/target wiring appended; A-3 К-L15 row — word-for-word vs `:577-584`; A-4 Part 0 metadata corrections ("DF012/DF015 (Error, Active)" → shipped truth; source quotes verified at K_CLOSURE `:514/:600`). Sole-canon-carrier claim spot-checked PASS (К-L12 at :219-223, К-L15 at :271-278, both verbatim against K_CLOSURE §2; К-L14 abbreviated with the ratified Q-N-8-2 exception declared at :35).

**KERNEL's other 8 defects (all mechanical, corrected truths already carried elsewhere in the same corpus):** "no Vulkan code in `native/`" ×2 sites + "C++20 stdlib only" ×2 sites — falsified by `compute_dispatch.cpp` (direct `vkCreateBuffer :56` … calls), `compute_pipeline.h:30` (`#include <vulkan/vulkan.h>`), `CMakeLists.txt:12,99` (`find_package(Vulkan REQUIRED)` + link) — and self-contradicted by К-L7.1's own artifact row (R1-3); Rule 4 "the mod ALC refuses kernel assemblies at runtime" — no such mechanism (`ModLoadContext.cs:29-54`), contradicts same-rework ARCHITECTURE §2 + MODDING §5 (R1-4, the truth-law violation); Rule 3 `AI | (leaf domain library)` vs `DualFrontier.AI.csproj:7-8` referencing Contracts+Components (R1-5); 5 stale ANALYZER_RULES section pointers (§4.1→§1.1, §7→§4 — predecessor numbering; cross-cluster root cause shared with THREADING ×1 + ECS ×1) (R1-6); "154 DF_API entry points" vs 205 `^DF_API` declarations across include/ (R1-7); К-L14 "14 verifications at HEAD" vs dashboard :259 "13 в active log (#10 vacated)" (R1-8); thread-pool Scheduler-mode arming is selftest-only today (R1-9); "ten systems" fabricating version-0 ids → nine (R1-10, pairs with ECS R1-16).

**THREADING consistency notes:** §1's unfenced "kernel scheduling decisions are made natively" reads as current truth against its own §2 production note (R1-13); §3 "no deletion trigger exists" vs EAM §3 naming one advisory (R1-14); §8 waiver-census pointer §4→§1.4 + unqualified `Directory.Build.props` anchor (root file has shader Exec lines at those exact numbers — actively misleading) (R1-12).

## R5 — Consolidated findings register

**Naming deviation (recorded):** the brief's `F-A-1..n` placeholder series is realized as cluster-provenance IDs (`R1-*`, `R2-*`, `R3-*`, `R4-*`, orchestrator `ORC-*`) — already unique, already used in every cluster section; a parallel renumbering would only add transcription risk. **Totals:** 66 findings = 2 seeded + 60 agent (17+20+23+... R1:17, R2:20, R3:23, R4:13 incl. 7 item-[6] records) + 4 orchestrator. Wave-R verdict field: every reviewed document READY or READY-WITH-FIX; **zero NOT-READY**. Every fix below marked *mechanical* has its exact replacement text either inline here or verbatim in its cluster section above; Phase B applies ratified text exactly.

### R5.1 — SEED-1 (KERNEL_ARCHITECTURE.md:37; = F-9 disposition; blocks the KERNEL flip until decided)

Defect: headline "**21 invariants** — К-L1..К-L19 (**К-L6 SUPERSEDED counted**) + sub-invariants К-L3.1/К-L7.1/К-L15.1" — the formula sums to 22 (19+3), and the Part 0 table carries 22 counted rows (23 incl. К-L20 RESERVED). Root cause: the rework **inverted** K_CLOSURE_REPORT.md:198's ratified convention "…+ 3 subs **− 1 SUPERSEDED counted**" (К-L6 excluded ⇒ 18+3=21 ✓) into "(К-L6 SUPERSEDED counted)".

- **Variant (a) — rewrite to 22:** contradicts the RESERVED_SURFACE_MUTABILITY.md:86 immutable-catalog «21 final» composition pin (К-L6 excluded) and strands ~91 immutable historical "21 invariant/final" citations (census: 93 Latin, 0 Cyrillic; nearly all in EXECUTED briefs / closure evidence / REGISTER narrative — census-delta would hit immutable records or leave them permanently contradicting the live headline).
- **Variant (b) — recompose keeping 21 (RECOMMENDED):** one-line fix, zero census motion, aligned with the standing pin and all historical citations. Exact text: `Series state: **21 invariants** — К-L1..К-L19 (К-L6 SUPERSEDED listed for traceability, excluded from the count) + sub-invariants К-L3.1/К-L7.1/К-L15.1; К-L20 reserved separately. (The Part 0 table carries 22 canonical-text rows — the 21 active plus the superseded К-L6, retained verbatim.)`
- Under variant (b) the §10 SOFT census records **zero delta** (the headline is the only in-scope occurrence among the 14 successors; the 93-hit corpus census is untouched). PR #43's body line "22 инварианта, машинно сверены" remains true of table rows and is reconciled by the parenthetical.
- F-9 closes with this decision; F-4 (bi-script ID duality) is NOT resolved by it — record disposition separately (KERNEL amendment remains architect-owned).
